---
title: "Some Questions of the Day"
---

## Some Questions of the Day

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1875
**Imprint:** London: Longman

### Notes

This originally appeared as \'Questions of the Day\', an irregular series of articles on theology in the <i>Monthly Packet</i> (June 1871-May 1875).

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
